posts.author: michaelcoral (michael hafzi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Enable multi-select for attached files so users can download or delete multiple files at once instead of handling them one by one.

What are you trying to achieve

I want the ability to select multiple attached files on a single item and apply bulk actions such as download or delete. Right now, files must be managed one at a time, which is slow and inefficient when an item contains many attachments. This feature would make file management faster, easier, and less error-prone, especially for teams that upload inspection photos, documents, and project files frequently.

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Managing files one by one is super inefficient, especially when items have dozens of attachments (inspections, projects, etc.). It turns a simple cleanup or download into a time sink and increases the chance of mistakes.

Bulk select/delete/download should be standard — this feels like a clear gap in the current experience.
